basic_details.job_title: MAHATRANSCO Superintending Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company (MSETCL) has officially announced the Superintending Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026 with 3 openings. The detailed notification was published on the official website, mahatransco.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 50 years for Outsiders, 55 years for Reserved Category Outsiders, and 57 years for Departmental candidates and hold a Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering / Technology or its equivalent can now submit their offline applications up to 12-06-2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply offline are shared b

age_limit.age_details: Outsider: 50 years, Reserved Category Outsider: 55 years, Departmental: 57 years
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit for Outsider: 50 years Maximum Age Limit for Reserved Category Outsider: 55 years Maximum Age Limit for Departmental Candidates: 57 years

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors Degree in Civil Engineering / Technology and its equivalent.
qualification.details: Superintending Engineer (Civil): Bachelors Degree in Civil Engineering / Technology and its equivalent. Experience: Total 12 years experience in the field of civil works related to Power Sector. Out of which at least 5 years as Executive Engineer & Additional Executive Engineer OR 2 years as Executive Engineer.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MSETCL Superintending Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.mahatransco.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
